original_image_tags: A rectangular stamp with a thin black border. Inside, the text reads "Released in Full" in a standard serif font.

elements.description: The page consists entirely of typed text, including headers, paragraphs, and a 'Released in Full' stamp. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, charts, or other graphical content embedded in the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a 'Released in Full' stamp, with Description A providing the visual detail of its rectangular shape and border that Description B omits.
